title: Selaggis
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Star |image= |name=Selaggis |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]] |system=[[Selaggis system/Legends|Selaggis system]]''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' |coordinates=N-6 |xyz= |routes=[[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]] |distance= |orbits=*[[Selaggis VI]] **[[Selcaron]] |stations= |asteroids= |other= |class= |diameter= }} {{Quote|Is there a star within range of the kind of variation you can enter?''"
"''YES. SELAGGIS. JUST WITHIN ZSINJ-CONTROLLED SPACE. A FEW LIGHT-YEARS AWAY. A YELLOW STAR, SEVEN WORLDS.|[[Gara Petothel]] and [[Tonin]]|}} '''Selaggis''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Selaggis system/Legends|Selaggis system]], a part of the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It lay on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]], which connected it to the [[Bandomeer system/Legends|Bandomeer]] and [[Vahaba system/Legends|Vahaba systems]]. Selaggis was a [[Color/Legends|yellow]] star [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by seven [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], including the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Selaggis VI]]. The planet Selaggis VI was orbited by several [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Selcaron]], and was also circled by a heavy [[Asteroid/Legends|debris]] [[Planetary ring/Legends|ring]] thought to have been another moon at one [[Time/Legends|time]]. {{Star-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Selaggis }} [[Category:Selaggis system locations]] [[Category:Stars in the New Territories]] [[Category:Stars in the Outer Rim Territories]]
